specific_question: How many over-the-air (OTA) updates primarily focused on reactive safety measures against cyber threats did the cybersecurity team at Elexion Automotive push in 2025?
answer: The cybersecurity team at Elexion Automotive has pushed two OTA updates primarily focused on reactive safety measures for its various models throughout 2025.
dr_question: In response to the April 2025 Help Net Security article, how well is Elexion Automotive poised to adapt and take proactive measures to prevent itself and its consumer base from the latest cybersecurity threats as we approach 2026?
